passiveAbilities.name: Dagger
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

activeAbilities.name: Reload [Shoot Musket]
activeAbilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.

activeAbilities.name: Take Aim
activeAbilities.description: Increase this character's Arcane stat by +1 until end of turn.

activeAbilities.name: Look Out!
activeAbilities.description: Target friendly character's Evade stat is reduced by -1 until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shoot Musket
arcaneAbilities.description:
[G]X: Target suffers X+2 Impact Dmg.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds and the Reload ability cannot be used for the remainder of the game.
